reviews.comment:
El playero que me tocó era bastante soberbio e inexperto...... lamentablemente no quiso decir su nombre...... es una lástima........ perjudica a sus compañeros también..... sólo puede decir que era joven.... calculo unos treinta años....... pelo ondulado y oscuro....

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendant I had was quite arrogant and inexperienced... unfortunately, he wouldn't give his name... it's a shame... it hurts his colleagues too... all I can say is that he was young... I'd guess around thirty... wavy, dark hair...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4770193588747859421/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM0enVqT0Z3EAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service from the beach staff, not recommended at all despite being a member

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, todo correcto, personal amable. El aire también funcionaba (detalle no menor)

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, everything was perfect, and the staff was friendly. The air conditioning also worked (a significant detail).

reviews.comment:
Buena atencion y el shop completisimo a veces un poco lenta la playa pero en general un lugar para cargar combustible y disfrutar de un buen café.

(Translated by Google)
Good service and a very complete shop. Sometimes the beach is a bit slow, but overall it's a great place to refuel and enjoy a good cup of coffee.
